5 C 5 1111111111 a mismatch

5 I 7 0100111011 6 mismatch

5 I 2 0100001000 2 mismatch

5 AND 72 0100001000 2 mismatch

3 0110110111 7
4 1000111010 5
5 0000110011 4
Starting at I 4 increasing
I 5 0101100001 partial 1100101001 5
I 6 0110100100 partial 0001100001 3
I 7 0100111011 partial 1011110111 8
left 16
Starting at I 3 decreasing
I 2 0100001000 partial 1011000100 4

right 16

3 I 5
4 I 6
5 I 7

Selected
0 I 2
1 I 3
2 I 4
3 XOR 50
4 XOR 61
5 XOR 72
6 I 3
7 I 4

Applying to 10111110
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 2 = 1
1 I 3 = 1
2 I 4 = 1
3 XOR 50 = XOR(I 5,I 0) = XOR(1,1) = 0
4 XOR 61 = XOR(I 6,I 1) = XOR(1,0) = 1
5 XOR 72 = XOR(I 7,I 2) = XOR(0,1) = 1
6 I 3 = 1
7 I 4 = 1

\boxed{11101111}
